evals.prompt: I need to start a new project to build a web application.
evals.expected_output: The skill should initiate the brainstorming phase to clarify the project intent and explore approaches.
assertions: The response should include the brainstorming phase.
The response should prompt for project details.

evals.prompt: I want to set up a long-running task to monitor my GitHub repositories.
evals.expected_output: The skill should initiate the brainstorming phase to clarify the task intent and explore approaches.
assertions: The response should include the brainstorming phase.
The response should prompt for task details.

evals.prompt: I need to execute a task to update my blog posts.
evals.expected_output: The skill should initiate the doing-tasks phase to execute the task with skill discipline.
assertions: The response should include the doing-tasks phase.
The response should prompt for task execution details.

evals.prompt: I want to verify if my latest code deployment was successful.
evals.expected_output: The skill should initiate the verify-task phase to confirm the completion of the task.
assertions: The response should include the verify-task phase.
The response should prompt for task verification details.

evals.prompt: I need to manage multiple tasks simultaneously.
evals.expected_output: The skill should suggest the use of dispatch-multiple-agents between write-plan and doing-tasks.
assertions: The response should include the dispatch-multiple-agents phase.
The response should prompt for task management details.
